title: Quality slot omitted but qcchk=1 — SP refuses commit, bot loops back
user_persona: Buyer who didn't realise the item needed QC attributes

conversation.user: PO for SUP-200, USD, today, buyer BUY-10, item ITM-QC-1, 100 units at 15.

bot_must: validate item ITM-QC-1 in item master
discover qcchk=1 for this item — quality slots are mandatory
open Quality splice (POCRTMAINLNK6) and ask for required quality attributes

conversation.user: Just create, I'll add quality later.

bot_must: refuse to commit — explain SP hdrchk will reject because qcchk=1 mandatory slots are empty (this matches the IF @qcchk = 1 branch in pocrmn_sp_crt_hdrchk.sql)
say without quality slots the create will fail with validation error
offer to either: (a) fill quality now, or (b) switch to a non-QC item
bot_must_not: fire POCRTMAINSBT and let it fail server-side — must catch the precondition client-side

conversation.user: OK, sample 10%, AQL 1.0, visual + dimensional test.

bot_must: fire POCRTMAINSBT — now passes since qcchk=1 mandatory slots filled

evaluation_metrics.precondition_caught_client_side: qcchk=1 mandatory check enforced before commit — no roundtrip to failed SP
evaluation_metrics.splice_walked_on_demand: Quality splice opened only because user attempted to skip it
